Metadata.title: Afterwords - Professional Translation Services in Greece
Metadata.description: Professional translation, interpreting, and subtitling services based in Athens, Greece. Certified translations, pharmaceutical, maritime, academic, and audiovisual translation.
Metadata.ogDescription: Professional translation, interpreting, and subtitling services based in Athens, Greece. Bridging the gap between the Greek market and the global stage.
Metadata.twitterDescription: Professional translation, interpreting, and subtitling services based in Athens, Greece.

Footer.tagline: Precision in every word. A boutique Greek translation agency bridging languages and cultures since 2015.

Home.headline: Precision in every word.
Home.heroDescription: A boutique Greek translation agency bridging the gap between the Greek market and the global stage. We provide the linguistic precision and cultural nuance your business needs to expand without borders.
Home.qualityDesc: 2-step review by a native speaker and a subject matter expert.
Home.speedDesc: Standard turnaround in 48 hours. Rush delivery available.
Home.consistencyDesc: Translation memory and terminology management ensure uniform language.
Home.aboutDescription: We pride ourselves on delivering tailored language solutions that empower our clients to communicate effectively, reach broader audiences, and achieve their goals with confidence.
Home.servicesDescription: From certified legal documents to live interpreting and cinematic subtitling — we deliver precision across every medium.
Home.certifiedTranslationsDesc: Translation of academic and public documents for submission to various authorities.
Home.interpretingServicesDesc: Professional interpreting services to ensure seamless communication in any setting.
Home.subtitlingServicesDesc: From TV series to feature films and entire film festivals, we ensure the narrative remains sharp in every frame.
Home.industriesDescription: We provide specialized translation services designed to meet the unique needs of businesses, organizations, and individuals.
Home.pharmaIndustryDesc: Regulatory-compliant translation for submissions, clinical documentation, and patient-facing materials.
Home.maritimeIndustryDesc: Technical and legal maritime translation for shipowners, crewing managers, and maritime law firms.
Home.academicIndustryDesc: Translations that preserve the intellectual rigor and voice of scholarly works.
Home.legalIndustryDesc: Accurate translations of contracts, legal proceedings, and financial statements.
Home.websitesIndustryDesc: Engaging and culturally attuned translations to enhance your online presence.
Home.agricultureIndustryDesc: Specialized translations bolstered by a PDC at Oregon State University.
Home.teamDescription: Our seasoned translators bring together diverse expertise to meet a wide range of translation and interpretation needs.
Home.aggelikiDesc: Aggeliki specializes in pharmaceutical, medical, clinical and patent translations, ensuring accuracy and professionalism in highly specialized fields.
Home.chrysanthiDesc: Chrysanthi delivers precision in academic, financial, legal, and maritime translation, complemented by professional Greek/English and Greek/Spanish interpretation services.
Home.annaMariaDesc: Anna Maria is your go-to specialist for maritime and legal translation, delivering linguistic precision with deep industry knowledge.
Home.portfolioPrompt: Curious what we've delivered? Explore a selection of our recent translation and interpreting projects.

CTA.ctaDescription: Books, contracts, conferences, films — every project starts with a conversation. Tell us what you're working on and we'll tell you how we'd approach it.

Testimonials.title: What our clients say
Testimonials.quote1: In 2023, the year when the title of the European Capital of Culture was awarded, 2023 Eleusis in cooperation with the Aikaterini Laskaridis Foundation and with its exclusive sponsorship, implemented the dedicated bilingual anthology They Wrote about Her with texts by Greek and foreign authors written about Eleusis, from antiquity to the present day. The Afterwords Translations team undertook the difficult task of translating texts from the entire range of this anthology. The collaboration was flawless at every level and the result was excellent with an emphasis on the quality of the style and meaning of the texts.
Testimonials.quote2: I strongly endorse Ms. Chatzistylianou as a subtitler. She is professional, reliable, and fast, with excellent knowledge of multiple languages, strong research abilities, and clear communication. Her expertise and work ethic make her one of the best in today's subtitling market.
Testimonials.quote3: Beyond their linguistic expertise, Afterwords Translations proves to be a collaborative and reliable team. They consistently go above and beyond to meet deadlines and play a crucial role in the overall success of our projects, especially focusing on chemical and technical patents.
Testimonials.quote4: After working with Afterwords Translations, I can confidently affirm their outstanding proficiency in medical and legal translations. Their precision, unwavering professionalism, and dedication to meeting deadlines make them an indispensable resource.
Testimonials.quote5: The Afterwords Translations team is dedicated and readily accessible to deliver outstanding services for translation and interpreting requirements. Moreover, they exhibit a high level of professionalism and ethical conduct, making them excellent colleagues. I wholeheartedly recommend their services.
Testimonials.quote6: We engaged Afterwords Translations for a high-stakes interpretation project and they delivered at a level few vendors reach. They were professional and strong on context, not just language. Communication was clear, controlled, and seamless throughout. I would work with them again without hesitation.
Testimonials.quote7: Our long-standing collaboration with Afterwords proves the quality of their work. They are a team of translators who respond with great success to the translation of texts from various scientific disciplines, always respecting the deadlines set each time.

Decade.title: Our Decade of Excellence
Decade.description: Since 2015 we have been bridging languages and cultures across industries with precision and care.

CertifiedTranslations.metaDescription: Official certified and sworn translations accepted by all Greek authorities. Ionian University graduates, PEEMPIP certified members with official association seals. Legal, civil, educational, and immigration documents.
CertifiedTranslations.ogTitle: Certified & Sworn Translations in Greece | Afterwords
CertifiedTranslations.ogDescription: Get certified translations from Ionian University graduates. Sworn translations with official association seals accepted by all public and private authorities in Greece.
CertifiedTranslations.jsonLdDescription: Official certified and sworn translations accepted by all Greek authorities. Legal, civil, educational, and immigration documents translated by Ionian University graduates.
CertifiedTranslations.heroBadge: Certified & Sworn Translations accepted by all Greek authorities
CertifiedTranslations.heroTitle: Official Greek Translations You Can Trust
CertifiedTranslations.heroSubtitle: Get certified translations from Ionian University graduates. Our sworn translations carry official association seals and are accepted by all public and private authorities in Greece and abroad.
CertifiedTranslations.featureAcademicDesc: Expert graduates of the Ionian University ensure linguistic precision and academic rigor for every document.
CertifiedTranslations.featureCertificationDesc: PEEMPIP members with official association seals for legal validity in all Greek public and private authorities.
CertifiedTranslations.featureEndToEndDesc: We handle translation, stamping, and delivery—including express shipping for urgent deadlines.
CertifiedTranslations.aboutP1: We specialize in certified and sworn translations for documents requiring legal validity in Greece. Whether you need to submit paperwork to ministries, embassies, tax offices (DOY), or educational institutions, our translations meet all regulatory standards.
CertifiedTranslations.aboutP2: As proud members of the Panhellenic Association of Professional Translators Graduates of the Ionian University (PEEMPIP), our translations carry the official association seals required for complete legal acceptance.
CertifiedTranslations.legalDesc: Certified translations for contracts, powers of attorney, court rulings, and notarial deeds with full legal validity.
CertifiedTranslations.civilDesc: Birth, marriage, and death certificates, criminal records, and all documents for submission to Greek public services and ministries.
CertifiedTranslations.educationalDesc: Diplomas, transcripts, and academic credentials certified for recognition by educational institutions and employers.
CertifiedTranslations.immigrationDesc: Visa applications, residence permits, and immigration documents translated and certified for Greek authorities.
CertifiedTranslations.processDescription: We've designed a seamless process to save you time: professional translation, official stamping, and final delivery—all handled by certified experts.
CertifiedTranslations.step01Desc: Send us your documents via email or our contact form. We review and provide a quote within hours.
CertifiedTranslations.step02Desc: Our certified translators handle your documents with precision, applying official seals and stamps.
CertifiedTranslations.step03Desc: Receive your certified translation digitally and via express courier, ready for submission.
CertifiedTranslations.deliveryDesc: High-quality digital scans and express shipping of physical hard copies directly to your door.
CertifiedTranslations.expressDesc: Urgent deadline? We offer express translation services to ensure you never miss a submission date.
CertifiedTranslations.acceptanceDesc: Translations accepted by all Greek public authorities, ministries, embassies, and private institutions.
CertifiedTranslations.credentialsDesc: Every translation is handled by expert graduates of the Ionian University and carries the official seals required for legal validity.
CertifiedTranslations.ctaTitle: Stamped, signed, and accepted where it matters.
CertifiedTranslations.ctaDescription: Court filings, diplomas, birth certificates, contracts — certified translations that hold up at embassies, ministries, and courtrooms across Europe.

Interpreting.metaDescription: Professional interpreting services for conferences, business meetings, legal proceedings, and events. Simultaneous and consecutive interpretation in Greek, English, Spanish, and more.
Interpreting.ogDescription: Professional interpreting services for conferences, business meetings, and events. Simultaneous and consecutive interpretation by experienced linguists.
Interpreting.jsonLdDescription: Simultaneous and consecutive interpreting for conferences, business meetings, legal proceedings, and events in multiple languages.
Interpreting.heroBadge: Athens-based agency specializing in live event interpretation
Interpreting.heroTitle: High-Impact Interpreting: The Voice of Your Global Event
Interpreting.heroSubtitle: In live events, there are no "second takes." We provide ready-for-stage interpreters for international summits and high-stakes board meetings.
Interpreting.featureSimultaneousDesc: Expert interpretation ensuring your speaker's charisma and nuances aren't lost in translation.
Interpreting.featureBidirectionalDesc: Greek and English fluency guaranteeing every attendee—local or foreign—remains fully engaged.
Interpreting.featureStageReadyDesc: Elite interpreters with the poise and stamina for complex topics and spontaneous Q&A sessions.
Interpreting.aboutP1: Precision requires more than fluency; it requires deep subject matter expertise. Our team thrives in corporate, legal, and diplomatic environments, adapting seamlessly to your specific professional register.
Interpreting.aboutP2: We eliminate the risks of "Bad Interpretation"—such as brand damage or miscommunication—through meticulous preparation. We bring the poise and stamina needed to handle complex technical topics and spontaneous Q&A sessions with absolute composure.
Interpreting.service1Desc: High-energy, stage-ready simultaneous interpreting for international conferences and corporate summits.
Interpreting.service2Desc: Discreet, high-level consecutive interpreting for executive sessions and high-stakes negotiations.
Interpreting.service3Desc: Deep briefing on your specific industry terminology to ensure accurate communication of complex concepts.
Interpreting.service4Desc: Elite linguistic talent that integrates flawlessly with your event's technical setup and production requirements.
Interpreting.whyDescription: Your trusted talent partner for elite linguistic services that integrate flawlessly with your event's technical setup.
Interpreting.why1Desc: We prioritize punctuality and professional readiness, ensuring your event starts on schedule.
Interpreting.why2Desc: Boutique partnership that values your brand's reputation with complete confidentiality.
Interpreting.why3Desc: Professional verbal communication that resonates across every language barrier—human to human.
Interpreting.specDescription: Whether it's a private executive session or a large-scale conference, we deliver human-led, professional verbal communication across language barriers.
Interpreting.ctaTitle: The right voice in the room.
Interpreting.ctaDescription: Board meetings, arbitration hearings, international summits — we match interpreters to your moment, not just your language pair.

Pharmaceutical.metaDescription: Regulatory-compliant pharmaceutical and medical translation services. Clinical documentation, pharmacovigilance, patient-facing materials, and regulatory submissions translated with precision.
Pharmaceutical.ogDescription: Regulatory-compliant pharmaceutical and medical translation for clinical documentation, pharmacovigilance, and regulatory submissions.
Pharmaceutical.jsonLdDescription: Regulatory-compliant pharmaceutical and medical translation for clinical documentation, pharmacovigilance, patient-facing materials, and regulatory submissions.
Pharmaceutical.heroBadge: Specialized pharmaceutical and life sciences translation
Pharmaceutical.heroTitle: Where Scientific Precision Meets Regulatory Compliance
Pharmaceutical.heroSubtitle: In pharmaceutical and clinical environments, language is part of compliance. A single error in an SmPC, PIL, regulatory dossier, or clinical trial document can delay approvals or raise regulatory scrutiny.
Pharmaceutical.featurePrecisionDesc: Expert translation by life sciences specialists with deep domain knowledge and terminology expertise.
Pharmaceutical.featureComplianceDesc: All projects follow structured terminology management and strict quality control for submission-ready results.
Pharmaceutical.featureAuditDesc: Accurate, consistent, audit-ready medical translation with comprehensive documentation and traceability.
Pharmaceutical.aboutDescription: We support pharmaceutical, biotech, and life sciences organizations with regulatory-compliant translation services designed for accuracy, consistency, and audit-readiness.
Pharmaceutical.service1Desc: Regulatory-compliant translation of EU submissions and multi-module dossiers with precise terminology management.
Pharmaceutical.service2Desc: Translation of SmPCs, package leaflets (PILs), and labeling texts that meet strict regulatory standards.
Pharmaceutical.service3Desc: Clinical trial documentation, protocols, and informed consent forms with absolute accuracy and consistency.
Pharmaceutical.service4Desc: Pharmacovigilance and MAH documentation with audit-ready quality and terminology precision.
Pharmaceutical.service5Desc: Patient-facing and medical materials that balance accuracy with accessibility and clarity.
Pharmaceutical.service6Desc: EU MDR and IVDR-compliant translation of IFUs, labeling, and technical documentation into all required EU languages for CE marking.
Pharmaceutical.qualityDescription: Every project undergoes a three-step review to ensure accurate, consistent, audit-ready medical translation.
Pharmaceutical.whyDescription: Because pharmaceutical translation is not just about language — it is about precision, compliance, and trust.
Pharmaceutical.why1Desc: Harmonized terminology across regulatory and clinical documentation ensures consistency and compliance.
Pharmaceutical.why2Desc: Consistency between submissions and updates with CAT tools, translation memories, and project glossaries.
Pharmaceutical.why3Desc: Encrypted, GDPR-compliant workflows protect sensitive data and maintain regulatory standards.
Pharmaceutical.commitmentDesc: We ensure confidence in every submission through rigorous quality control and domain expertise.
Pharmaceutical.ctaDescription: Regulatory dossiers, clinical trial protocols, patient leaflets — translated by specialists who know EMA and FDA requirements inside-out.

Maritime.metaDescription: Specialized maritime translation services for shipowners, crewing managers, and maritime law firms. Technical and legal maritime documentation translated with industry expertise.
Maritime.ogDescription: Technical and legal maritime translation for shipowners, crewing managers, and maritime law firms. Deep industry knowledge meets linguistic precision.
Maritime.jsonLdDescription: Technical and legal maritime translation for shipowners, crewing managers, and maritime law firms.
Maritime.heroBadge: Boutique, human-led linguistic support with a dedicated partner for every fleet
Maritime.heroTitle: High-Stakes Maritime Translation: Precision for the Global Fleet
Maritime.heroSubtitle: In shipping, a "near-miss" costs more than just time — it costs operational safety. We provide boutique, human-led linguistic support with a dedicated partner for every fleet.
Maritime.featureSMEDesc: We pair naval linguists with industry-standard glossaries to guarantee absolute terminology consistency from the bridge to the engine room.
Maritime.featureTEPDesc: Our gold-standard Translation, Editing, and Proofreading workflow eliminates the risks of non-compliance.
Maritime.featureSPOCTitle: A Dedicated Single Point of Contact
Maritime.featureSPOCDesc: Forget anonymous help-desks. You are assigned a permanent project lead who understands your fleet's history, terminology, and specific operational needs.
Maritime.aboutEyebrow: Precision and Personal Accountability for the Greek Shipping Cluster
Maritime.aboutP1: We specialize in technical and legal maritime translation for shipowners, crewing managers, and maritime law firms. Whether managing dense engineering manuals from German shipyards or complex Italian litigation, we deliver documentation that meets the highest international standards.
Maritime.aboutP2: At Afterwords, we move beyond the "agency model." We operate as a remote extension of your office, assigning a dedicated specialist to your account. This ensures that the person handling your LMAA arbitration today is the same one who understands your fleet's technical DNA tomorrow.
Maritime.aboutSidebar: Your dedicated partner for maritime linguistic excellence across the European shipping cluster.
Maritime.servicesDescription: Each engagement is logged with the same rigour as a ship's operational record.
Maritime.service1Desc: Precise translation for Charter Party disputes, Bills of Lading, and LMAA arbitration. We provide the linguistic security required for high-stakes maritime litigation.
Maritime.service2Desc: Ensuring compliance for Seafarer Employment Agreements (SEA), PEME medicals, and STCW certifications across our core European language sets.
Maritime.service3Desc: Localizing Safety Management Systems and fleet-wide safety bulletins to ensure a unified safety culture across your entire fleet.
Maritime.whyDescription: Unlike AI, our human-led process understands the critical nuances of maritime law — preserving the technical precision that algorithms frequently overlook.
Maritime.why1Desc: You are served by a specific individual, not a rotating queue of employees. This builds a "long-term memory" of your company's preferred terminology and formatting.
Maritime.why2Desc: Shipping doesn't stop. Your dedicated partner is available for "Vessel in Port" emergencies and urgent weekend requests via direct communication lines.
Maritime.why3Desc: We treat your commercial intelligence with the same privilege as a law firm, utilizing secure transfers and project-specific NDAs for every file.
Maritime.why4Desc: Unlike AI, our human-led process understands the critical nuances of maritime law—preserving the technical precision that algorithms frequently overlook.
Maritime.langDescription: We provide end-to-end linguistic solutions for high-impact shipping projects across these core jurisdictions:
Maritime.langFRDetail: Mediterranean and West African trade routes
Maritime.langESDetail: Port authority and Latin American logistics
Maritime.ctaDescription: Urgent arbitration filings, technical manuals, charter party disputes — maritime work rarely waits, and neither do we.

Academic.metaDescription: High-quality academic and book translation services preserving intellectual rigor, nuance, and voice of scholarly works. Specialized in academic publications, research papers, and educational materials.
Academic.ogDescription: High-quality translations preserving intellectual rigor and voice of scholarly works for academic publication and research.
Academic.jsonLdDescription: High-quality academic and book translation services preserving intellectual rigor, nuance, and voice of scholarly works for academic publication.
Academic.heroBadge: A boutique Greek agency specializing in long-form academic translation
Academic.heroTitle: High-Stakes Academic Translation: Beyond the Algorithm
Academic.heroSubtitle: In scholarly publishing, a "near-miss" costs more than just credibility—it costs your budget. Unlike AI, our human-led process preserves the author's unique voice and charisma.
Academic.featureSMEDesc: Pairing linguists with advanced Translation Memories guarantees absolute terminology consistency across every chapter.
Academic.featureTEPDesc: Gold-standard Translation, Editing, Proofreading workflow eliminates costly reprints and brand damage.
Academic.featureStaminaDesc: Maintaining technical accuracy from preface to index for 500+ page academic manuscripts.
Academic.aboutP1: We specialize in long-form academic translation for textbooks in Econometrics, Economics, Politics, and Pedagogics. Whether managing dense Econometrics data or complex Pedagogical theory, we deliver manuscripts that meet the highest international standards.
Academic.aboutP2: We eliminate the risks of a "Bad Translation"—such as costly reprints and brand damage—by utilizing a gold-standard TEP (Translation, Editing, Proofreading) workflow.
Academic.service1Desc: Specializing in STEM, Econometrics, and Social Sciences with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) paired with advanced Translation Memories for guaranteed terminology consistency.
Academic.service2Desc: Sensitive translation for Memoirs and Novels that preserves authorial "voice" and charisma—something AI cannot replicate.
Academic.service3Desc: Localizing interactive course materials and pedagogical platforms for global learning environments.
Academic.service4Desc: Ensuring research is "journal-ready" for international peer-reviewed publication with precise academic language.
Academic.whyDescription: Unlike AI, which often misses nuance and metaphor, our human-led process preserves the author's unique voice and charisma.
Academic.why1Desc: Fixed royalty or budget models eliminate financial uncertainty and integrate seamlessly with your production cycle.
Academic.why2Desc: We consistently meet strict print deadlines without compromising literary quality by combining CAT tools with expert linguists.
Academic.why3Desc: We deliver manuscripts that meet the highest international standards for academic publishing.
Academic.specDescription: We provide end-to-end linguistic solutions for high-volume and high-impact publishing projects.
Academic.ctaTitle: Your manuscript deserves a careful reader.
Academic.ctaDescription: Whether it's a 500-page textbook or a journal article under deadline, bring it to translators who treat scholarship with the patience it requires.

Audiovisual.metaDescription: Professional subtitling and audiovisual translation services for TV series, feature films, documentaries, and film festivals. Ensuring the narrative remains sharp in every frame.
Audiovisual.ogDescription: Professional subtitling and audiovisual translation for TV series, films, documentaries, and festivals. Cultural adaptation that keeps the narrative sharp.
Audiovisual.jsonLdDescription: Professional subtitling and audiovisual translation for TV series, feature films, documentaries, and film festivals.
Audiovisual.heroBadge: Bridging borders through expert audiovisual translation
Audiovisual.heroTitle: Bringing Your Content to Global Audiences
Audiovisual.heroSubtitle: From TV series to feature films and entire film festivals, we ensure the narrative remains sharp and impactful across every frame.
Audiovisual.featureSyncDesc: Industry-leading software guarantees precise timing and formatting for seamless viewer experiences.
Audiovisual.featureGenreDesc: We navigate all genres and registers—comedic, technical, or dramatic—with equal expertise.
Audiovisual.featureSpeedDesc: Understanding tight entertainment industry turnaround times without sacrificing accuracy.
Audiovisual.aboutP1: Bring your content to a global audience with our specialized subtitling services. With extensive experience in audiovisual translation, we handle diverse formats—including TV series, documentaries, feature films, theatre performances, and entire film festivals.
Audiovisual.aboutP2: Whether your project is monolingual or a complex, multilingual production, our team ensures the narrative remains sharp and impactful across every frame.
Audiovisual.service1Desc: Comprehensive subtitling for television series with consistent character voice and terminology throughout entire seasons.
Audiovisual.service2Desc: Precise translation that preserves the educational and informational integrity of documentary content across all genres.
Audiovisual.service3Desc: Theatre-quality subtitles that capture the emotional nuance and dramatic timing of feature film productions.
Audiovisual.service4Desc: Specialized subtitling for theatre performances and live events, respecting the unique dynamics of staged productions.
Audiovisual.whyDescription: We leverage industry-leading software to guarantee flawless synchronization, strictly adhering to your specific timing and formatting requirements.
Audiovisual.why1Desc: We navigate all genres and registers with ease, ensuring that the tone of your original content—whether comedic, technical, or dramatic—is perfectly adapted for your target viewers.
Audiovisual.why2Desc: We understand the tight turnaround times inherent in the entertainment industry and deliver high-quality subtitles without ever sacrificing accuracy.
Audiovisual.why3Desc: Partner with us for a seamless, professional viewing experience that respects both the art on screen and the constraints of your deadline.
Audiovisual.specDescription: We handle projects ranging from monolingual content to complex, multilingual productions across all formats and genres.
Audiovisual.ctaTitle: Subtitles your audience will forget they're reading.
Audiovisual.ctaDescription: Feature films, documentaries, entire festival slates — we time, translate, and quality-check every frame so the story lands intact.

Portfolio.metaDescription: Explore our translation portfolio spanning medical, scientific, maritime, legal, audiovisual, and academic sectors. See the breadth and quality of our professional translation work.
Portfolio.ogDescription: Explore our translation portfolio spanning medical, scientific, maritime, legal, audiovisual, and academic sectors.
Portfolio.heroBadge: Showcasing our expertise across specialized translation domains
Portfolio.heroSubtitle: Explore our portfolio of translation and localization projects. From medical patents to published books, we deliver precision and cultural expertise across industries.
Portfolio.featureSMEDesc: Specialized translators with deep domain expertise in medical, legal, and technical fields.
Portfolio.featureTEPDesc: Gold-standard Translation, Editing, Proofreading workflow ensures quality and accuracy.
Portfolio.featureTrackDesc: From medical patents to published books, we deliver excellence across all project types.
Portfolio.workDescription: Our portfolio spans specialized translation domains, from medical patents and legal compliance to literary publishing and media localization.
Portfolio.workP2: Each project demonstrates our commitment to precision, cultural expertise, and professional excellence. We leverage subject matter expertise and advanced Translation Memories to deliver consistent, high-quality results.
Portfolio.medicalDesc: Expert translations for the medical and scientific sectors, including patent specifications, pharmaceutical applications, clinical research, and healthcare documentation.
Portfolio.medicalItem1: Patent Specifications: Annual translation of 200–300 patent specifications specializing in biology, chemistry, biochemistry, and technology.
Portfolio.medicalItem2: Pharmaceutical Applications: Translation of 150–200 patent applications and abstracts per year.
Portfolio.medicalItem3: Clinical Research: Translation of clinical trial documents, medical research papers, and articles for publication.
Portfolio.medicalItem4: Healthcare Documentation: Comprehensive translation of patient records and medical reports.
Portfolio.legalDesc: Certified translations for international business operations, corporate governance, global finance, market intelligence, and international law.
Portfolio.legalItem1: Corporate Governance: Translation of contracts, agreements, and certificates for international business operations.
Portfolio.legalItem2: Global Finance: Preparation of financial reports, balance sheets, and income statements.
Portfolio.legalItem3: Market Intelligence: Translation of investment research reports and market analyses.
Portfolio.legalItem4: International Law: Translation of treaties, conventions, and residency applications.
Portfolio.booksDesc: High-quality translations of academic and scholarly books, preserving intellectual rigor and authorial voice for Greek readers.
Portfolio.booksItem1: The Sociology of Health and Illness (4th Edition) by Sarah Nettleton.
Portfolio.booksItem2: Development Economics: Theory and Practice (2nd Edition) by Alain de Janvry & Elisabeth Sadoulet.
Portfolio.booksItem3: Managerial Economics in a Global Economy (9th Edition) by Dominick Salvatore.
Portfolio.booksItem4: Mathematics for Economics: An Integrated Approach by Mik Wisniewski.
Portfolio.booksItem5: Child Observation: A Guide for Students of Early Childhood (4th Edition) by Ioanna Palaiologou.
Portfolio.mediaDesc: Professional subtitling services for TV series, films, and festivals, along with specialized interpreting for corporate conferences and the aviation sector.
Portfolio.mediaItem1: TV Series Localization: Greek subtitles for the hit series "Black-ish".
Portfolio.mediaItem2: Film Festivals: Subtitling for the Beyond Borders International Festival (2019–2022).
Portfolio.mediaItem3: Cinema: English and French subtitles for the Greek short film "MAUVE".
Portfolio.mediaItem4: Corporate Conferences: Interpreting for the Coating Forum (2022–2023) and pharmaceutical launches.
Portfolio.mediaItem5: Aviation Sector: Specialized interpreting for business meetings and technical presentations.
Portfolio.translationDesc: Accurate translation of documents, websites, and content across all major languages
Portfolio.localizationDesc: Cultural adaptation of products, websites, and marketing for local markets
Portfolio.transcreationDesc: Creative translation that preserves brand voice and emotional impact
Portfolio.culturalConsultingDesc: Expert guidance on cultural nuances and market-specific communication strategies
Portfolio.ctaDescription: You've seen the work. Now tell us about yours, and we'll walk you through how we'd approach it.

GetAQuote.ogDescription: Tell us about your translation project and choose your preferred way to get in touch. Free quotes for certified translations, interpreting, and subtitling services.

SEO.localBusinessDescription: Professional translation, interpreting, and subtitling services based in Athens, Greece. Specializing in certified translations, pharmaceutical, maritime, and academic translation.
